zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Shardelow於大約1336年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾武特比時，她的父親Sir John de Shardelow22歲，母親Margaret Hocknell17歲。她於1370年之前與Sir John de Brewse結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1376年在英國林可爾史爾武特比享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Shardelow于大约1336年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾武特比时，她的父亲Sir John de Shardelow22岁，母亲Margaret Hocknell17岁。她于1370年之前与Sir John de Brewse结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1376年在英国林可爾史爾武特比享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Shardelow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Shardlow in Derbyshire, so named from Old English sceard ‘notched’ + hlāw ‘hill, mound’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Shardelow was born about 1336, in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Shardelow, was 22 and her mother, Margaret Hocknell, was 17. She married Sir John de Brewse before 1370. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1376, in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Shardelow est née environ 1336, à Utterby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Shardelow, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hocknell, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Brewse avant 1370. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1376, à Utterby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Shardelow um 1336 in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Shardelow 22 und ihre Mutter Margaret Hocknell 17. Sie hat vor 1370 Sir John de Brewse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1376 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Shardelow è nata il circa 1336 nel Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John de Shardelow, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margaret Hocknell, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Brewse prima del 1370. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1376, nel Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Shardelowが約1336年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウッテルビーで生まれた時，父Sir John de Shardelowは22歳，母Margaret Hocknellは17歳であった。1370年以前にSir John de Brewseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1376年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウッテルビーで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Shardelow(이)가 대략 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 우터비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Shardelow(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Hocknell(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1370년 이전 Sir John de Brewse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1376년 영국 링코실르 우터비에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Shardelow родилась около 1336 г. в местности уттирби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Shardelow было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hocknell, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Brewse перед 1370 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1376 г. в местности уттирби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Shardelow nació aproximadamente 1336, en Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Shardelow, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Hocknell, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Sir John de Brewse antes de 1370. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1376, en Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
